brand.name: The WOL Collective
brand.navTagline: By us. For us. Against what was built to erase us.
brand.quote: "Style as protest. Fabric as memory. Movement as design."

headline: Rewrite
The
System
hero.title: A one-product store built as a uniform for memory, resistance, and belonging.
hero.text: The WOL Collective is an Afro-centred clothing project building garments around memory, resistance, and cultural authorship. This first release stays singular: one statement piece, one clear voice, one disciplined silhouette.

manifesto.heading: Designed as witness. Built to be worn every day.
manifesto.body: WOL treats clothing as an archive of pressure, survival, softness, and refusal. The first release is intentionally focused so the product carries the full weight of the message instead of being buried inside a catalogue.

product.name: Product 001: The System Breaker Overshirt
product.description: A heavyweight black overshirt cut with calm structure, contrast seam mapping, and a clean silhouette intended to feel ceremonial without losing street function.
product.story: Built as a single-anchor release, the overshirt is meant to be worn as an everyday uniform. It balances restraint and defiance: soft drape, firm shoulders, and a message carried through proportion rather than noise.

waitlist.title: Stay close to the next drop.
waitlist.body: Leave your email for launch updates, restocks, and the next WOL release.
waitlist.note: Connect a real form endpoint later if you want collected emails to persist outside the browser.
